reviews.review_description:
I like looking at reviews on sidequest with video play by the reviewer. 
This was one of them, it looked good and polished, plus the price was a winner.
 
I have only done three rounds so far, but the gameplay is good and you have to be quick. It's energetic and would make out a great burnout. Although my arms were tired after 3 rounds, due to old injury and throwing action best for this game, won't stop me playing in short spurts. But I would recommend this game wholeheartedly. It seems like a steal at the price I paid.

developer_response.body:
Bizkit1961
Many thanks for the rating and 5* review. I think it surprises people just what a mini workout it can be. if we get some solid user support on the game we will be adding more modes and levels. We had some high scores over the weekend but will be watching for you creeping up the leader boards! Thanks again from team Side Hustle!

reviews.review_description: I love this, nice learning curve, enough to keep me practicing! Some cheeky touches that up the difficulty level too… keep it up ZomBall!

developer_response.body: Spinsterboy - looking forward to seeing you in the leaderboards! Thanks So much for the review!

reviews.review_description: Had to force myself to stop because my arm hurt. Weirdly addictive. Keep up the good work!

developer_response.body:
Hi MisssElaineous,
Many thanks for the review and feedback, Do make sure you rest up as it can be pretty physical as your immersed. Keep a look out for updates soon!

reviews.review_description: for the price, it's well worth it. I was surprised that I played till my arm hurt. I definitely recommend this purchase.  I look forward to seeing what else this dev does.gg

developer_response.body: All Hail to the King Indeed!  We have lots of new plans- including you can choose different balls and it will change the zombies to that sport, lots of new levels and plans for some co-op and special competitions!  If you have any videos or ideas please share to Hello@sidehustlegames.com

reviews.review_description:
I have a rather large number of vr games, between quest store and pcvr titles. I Downloaded this game last week I think and kind of forgot about it. This morning  before work I decided,  I got 30 min, let me go play something. Put this on and was amazed how fun it was (Im doing football atm). Come home , goto play a game and ended up wanting to play a round of this first , well almost dinner time and this is all I played. 

5 stars 🌟  . Awesome job devs, however you did trick me to work out 😒 .. lol 😆  👏 👏

developer_response.body: swcceo15 - It means an awful lot the time taken to review and positive comments. Hopefully we can build upon it if we get enough players interested! Sorry About tricking you to workout! Let us know if anything else  you would like in updates via hello@sidehustlegames.com. Go nuts and thanks again!

reviews.review_title: My son loves it and so do I!
reviews.review_description:
Pick up and play, fast paced and 18 initial levels.
Steady increase in difficulty and a great alternative for a workout!

developer_response.body: Thanks SO MUCH for the review, if you have any suggestions or ideas please send them to hello@sidehustlegames.com. We will be updating soon with more levels and features.

reviews.review_description: This is a simple game but sometimes simple is good. Throwing balls at Zombies. The bottom line is the throwing physics are very good, it feels like your throwing a ball handball/dodgeball style. Highly recommended for short fun workouts.

developer_response.body: Dessboy60 - Thank you so much for taking the time to review and score. it's exactly what we’re aiming for, something you can jump in and out of. We have lots of ideas for levels and changes, and even planning an editor for User generated content. If you have any ideas please send them over. hello@sidehustlegames.com  Hope to see you in the top Slayers soon!

reviews.review_title: Zombie Range is good, clean, VR Fun
reviews.review_description:
Read the Full Review here - https://www.worldofgeekstuff.com/zombie-range-review-vr-zombie-football/

Zombie Range currently costs $2.99 in the App labs store. This is a crazy good deal. 

Throwing footballs at zombies, carnival-style, is easy enough that children or more senior players can do it, but challenging enough at higher levels that it is great fun for everyone.

This is a great game to add to your workout mix, as constantly throwing footballs will definitely get your heart rate going.

developer_response.body: Hey DreamGeekGal, we are totally Stoked at your 5* review both here and on your website! We love that you get what we’re trying to do here... Simple, polished fun and a sharp blast workout if you want it to be! We’re hoping we can add more gameplay and maybe even editor for UGC as we progress. Thank you so much! The SHG TEAM

reviews.review_description: I really like this game. It’s not over complicated. It reminds me of a shooting gallery where you have to shoot the stuff as it pops up.

developer_response.body: Thankyou so much- its exactly what we were going for a pick up and play 5 minutes. really appreciate the time taken to review.

reviews.review_description: The game has a very simple mechanic that's easy to learn and lots of fun. Throwing balls at zombies is surprising hilarious when screen sharing to other devices and watching your child/parent moving their arms like a maniac. 5 stars all round!

developer_response.body: Hey LuxeyVR  Thanks so much for taking the time to review and play. 5* is amazing!! If we can get people having fun and moving its a win for us! We want people to Exorcise while you Exercise and swap Zumba for Zombies!!! See you on the leader board!

reviews.review_title: Made it into the top 10, its addicting!
reviews.review_description:
Oh boy does this cause me to break a phat sweat while playing! This game is addicting and I have been working hard and made it to the top 10 on the leaderboards. It's like the clown ball game at Chuck E Cheese but with zombies. From throwing so dang hard and to get to the higher angled pop ups my flippin shoulder has been hurting for the last 3 days haha, but I had to get to the top 10! Some of the zombies are a total pain when you have these dang pedestrians blocking them, they are the most annoying and you lose points for hitting the civilians, but it ads challenge. 

Great game and worth the purchase devs thank you!

developer_response.body: Hey UHATEIT, Thanks so much for review!!  it's Amazing to hear your enjoying and competing so hard. There are some serious and Even Pro players on that board, so this is a real achievement! Would love to see a video of you playing!!  Don't forget to rest up as well... It's nearly Halloween and we will need all the best players to protect us!!!

reviews.review_description: This is great sweaty fun, the Zombie Range just gets you going from the off. With the levels coming thick and fast, subtly just pulling you further and further in. Absolutely belting fun!

developer_response.body:
Well hello Swindos!  many thanks for the 5* review and comments.  Great we could get you moving and enjoying! We will have lots more modes and features as we get feedback from players, this is a chance for people to help shape where this goes!
See you in the leader boards!! SHG TEAM
